characters.appearance: A stylized, 2D cartoon owl. It is bright green with a rounded body, large eyes, a small yellow beak, and small wings.
characters.wardrobe: Typically unclad. In some scenes, it wears black sunglasses.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: पानी... Water. [Water... Water.]

[music only, no speech]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the basic learning interface.
- Shows a simple vocabulary matching exercise (Hindi to English) to build foundational confidence.
- Establishes a rewarding, gamified loop.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Select the correct English word
पानी
Milk
Bread
Water
Cat

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: ब्रेड... Bread. [Bread... Bread.]

[music only, no speech]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Continues the learning loop with another everyday vocabulary word.
- Highlights the in-app reward system (2x multiplier) to keep users motivated and engaged.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Select the correct English word
ब्रेड
Bread
Dog
Avocado
Milk
2x

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: दूध... Milk. रोज़ practice करो! [Milk... Milk. Practice daily!]

[music only, no speech]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the importance of daily learning habits.
- Shows the '15 day streak' milestone, encouraging consistency.
- Mascot transformation adds a fun, celebratory payoff for the user's dedication.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Select the correct English word
दूध
Avocado
Milk
Bread
Water
Amazing!
15 day streak!

scenes.scene_summary:
- Displays the competitive and social aspect of the app.
- Shows the user climbing to the top of the leaderboard, providing a strong sense of achievement and progress.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Final call to action.
- Replaces competitor's 'free' claim with Supernova's core value proposition of speaking English with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
